SOURCE: r/graphic_design (Reddit)
WHERE: `https://www.reddit.com/r/graphic_design/`
SIGNAL: Discussions about design workflows, tool frustrations, client communication specific to visual projects, challenges in maintaining brand consistency across diverse media.

SOURCE: Envato Tuts+ (Design & Illustration, Web Design sections)
WHERE: `https://tutsplus.com/categories/design-illustration`, `https://tutsplus.com/categories/web-design`
SIGNAL: Tutorials and articles often reveal pain points professionals face when learning new techniques or trying to optimize their creative process in design and web development.
CATEGORY: Education Evolution / Design Alchemy

SOURCE: Behance (Project Comments/Discussions)
WHERE: `https://www.behance.net/search/projects?field=web-design` (or similar for other creative fields)
SIGNAL: While primarily showcasing work, comments and discussions on challenging projects or critiques can reveal underlying frustrations with tools, client briefs, or repetitive tasks in creative production.
CATEGORY: Design Alchemy / Office Automation
